name: Courtyard by Marriott, Atlanta
summary: A comprehensive FF&E renovation for a premier Courtyard by Marriott location in the heart of Atlanta, delivering modern guest room furnishings and public space upgrades.
quote: Great experience. It's what you work hard to create for your hotel guests. It's also what you get with Pinnacle South.
overview: Pinnacle South was engaged to manage the full FF&E scope for a significant renovation of the Courtyard by Marriott in Atlanta, Georgia. The project encompassed guest rooms, corridors, lobby, and dining areas, requiring close coordination with the ownership group, design team, and general contractor. Our team managed vendor sourcing, procurement, logistics, and installation coordination to ensure the property met Marriott's updated brand standards while maintaining the project timeline and budget.
spotlight: Working within a compressed renovation timeline, our team coordinated the delivery and installation of over 200 guest room packages, lobby furniture, and restaurant seating. By leveraging our established vendor relationships and proactive logistics planning, we achieved on-time delivery with minimal property disruption. The completed renovation met all Marriott brand standards and received positive feedback from ownership and property management.

name: Homewood Suites, Charlotte
summary: Full FF&E procurement and installation support for a new-build Homewood Suites by Hilton in Charlotte, delivering extended-stay guest room and public space furnishings to brand standards.
quote: Distinctive design that's stylish. Smart buying that's relentless. Installation that's flawless. Personal service that's tireless. Managing process that's seamless.
overview: Pinnacle South was engaged to manage FF&E procurement and installation coordination for a new-build Homewood Suites by Hilton in Charlotte, North Carolina. The project included guest room case goods, seating, and bedding, along with lobby, breakfast, and fitness area furnishings. Our team worked with the ownership group and general contractor to align specifications with Hilton brand standards, manage vendor lead times, and coordinate phased delivery and installation to support the property's opening schedule.
spotlight: Coordinating FF&E for a new-build required tight alignment with construction milestones. We secured inventory and managed logistics so guest room and public area furnishings arrived on schedule, enabling the property to open on time. Quality checks and punch-list support ensured every space met Homewood Suites brand standards before handover to the owner.

name: Courtyard by Marriott, Nashville
summary: FF&E procurement and installation for a Courtyard by Marriott in Nashville, delivering modern guest room furnishings, workstation seating, and public space upgrades to Marriott brand standards.
quote: Make your guests really feel like guests, not just customers.
overview: Pinnacle South managed the full FF&E scope for the Courtyard by Marriott in Nashville, Tennessee. The project included guest room case goods, bedding, and the signature work desk and ergonomic seating, along with lobby and common area furnishings. Our team coordinated with the ownership group and design team to source and deliver all items to Marriott specifications, managing vendor lead times and installation to align with the property's opening timeline.
spotlight: Sourcing and delivering the distinctive guest room workstation and seating—a hallmark of the Courtyard brand—required close coordination with our vendor network. We ensured on-time delivery and installation so the Nashville property could open with fully furnished, brand-compliant rooms. Final walk-through and punch-list support ensured every detail met ownership and Marriott standards.

name: Homewood Suites, New Orleans
summary: FF&E procurement and installation for a Homewood Suites by Hilton in New Orleans, including guest rooms, outdoor courtyard and pergola seating, and public spaces to brand standards.
quote: Our business is making your business grow
overview: Pinnacle South was engaged to manage FF&E for the Homewood Suites by Hilton in New Orleans, Louisiana. The scope included guest room furnishings, extended-stay amenities, and the signature outdoor courtyard area with pergola, seating, and side tables. Our team coordinated with ownership and the general contractor to source and deliver all items to Hilton brand specifications and support the property's opening schedule.
spotlight: The outdoor courtyard and pergola seating required careful coordination of vendor lead times and installation sequencing. We delivered the wicker seating, cushions, and side tables on schedule so the amenity space was ready for opening. Quality checks and brand compliance review ensured the space met Homewood Suites standards and ownership expectations.

name: Hampton Inn & Suites, Tampa
summary: FF&E procurement and installation for a Hampton Inn in Tampa, Florida, delivering guest room furnishings, work desk and seating, and brand-aligned finishes to Hilton standards.
quote: We do the little things that create big moments for your guests and for your revenue.
overview: Pinnacle South managed the FF&E scope for the Hampton Inn in Tampa, Florida. The project included guest room case goods, bedding, the signature work desk and accent chair, floating nightstands, and coordinated wall and floor finishes. Our team worked with ownership and the design team to source and deliver all items to Hampton brand specifications and support the property's opening timeline.
spotlight: Coordinating the Hampton-specific guest room package—including the distinctive headboard, desk chair, and carpet pattern—required close vendor alignment and installation sequencing. We ensured on-time delivery and installation so the Tampa property could open with fully furnished, brand-compliant rooms. Final walk-through and punch-list support ensured every detail met Hampton and ownership standards.

name: Celebration Hotel, FL
summary: FF&E procurement and installation for the Celebration Hotel in Florida, delivering guest room and public space furnishings for the landmark coastal-style property.
quote: Our focus is FF&E details so you can focus on your other responsibilities.
overview: Pinnacle South was engaged to manage FF&E for the Celebration Hotel in Celebration, Florida. The project included guest room furnishings, lobby and common area seating, and coordinated finishes for the property's distinctive coastal Southern architecture. Our team worked with ownership and the design team to source and deliver all items on schedule, supporting the hotel's standards for comfort and style.
spotlight: The property's classic exterior and courtyard setting required FF&E that complemented the architecture. We coordinated vendor lead times and installation so guest rooms and public spaces were fully furnished for opening. Quality checks and punch-list support ensured every space met ownership expectations and the property's upscale positioning.
